## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python3 -m pytest tests/ -q`
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] CLI command added (if new calculation module)
- [ ] GUI integration done (new tab, table, or section)
- [ ] TUI integration done (new menu item + action)
- [ ] AI prompt updated in `src/jhora/ai/analysis.py` (if new computed data)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing APIs
- [ ] No copyrighted content (books, PDFs, ephemeris data)

## How to test

<!-- Steps to verify the change works -->
```bash
jhora <command> "<birthdata>"
```
